title: Object pronouns in the past
subtitle: Say I bought it, I saw her, I called them.
overview: Object pronouns stay before the conjugated past verb.
Use lo, la, los, las with completed actions.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I called them in the afternoon.
I lost them at the hotel.

items.es: Compré el libro. Lo compré ayer.
items.en: I bought the book. I bought it yesterday.

items.es: Vi a Ana. La vi en la estación.
items.en: I saw Ana. I saw her at the station.

items.es: Necesitaba las llaves, pero las perdí.
items.en: I needed the keys, but I lost them.

items.es: Busqué los zapatos y los encontré.
items.en: I looked for the shoes and found them.

items.es: No entendí la explicación. No la entendí.
items.en: I did not understand the explanation. I did not understand it.
